title: camp listing manifest (.camp/listing.yml)
description: Descriptive listing content, kept in the plugin's own repository (RFC §4.1) and treated as untrusted input: the description is sanitized markdown (no raw HTML), screenshots are raster-only and re-encoded by CI. Ingested and hash-pinned at each tagged release.

name.description: Human-readable plugin name shown in listings.

summary.description: One-line description for search results and cards.

description.description: Long description in markdown. Rendered sanitized: no raw HTML.

labels.description: Disclosure labels declared by the author (RFC §4.7). Validated by CI heuristics and Tier 3 review; deliberate mislabeling is a trust violation.

category.description: Browsing category on the website (free-form for now; a controlled vocabulary is an open question for the website phase).

screenshots.description: Paths relative to the repository root. Raster formats only (png/jpg/webp — no SVG); CI decodes, resizes, strips metadata, and re-emits every image.
